de.uka.ilkd.key.core

Class KeYMediator

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.core.KeYMediator

  • public class KeYMediator
extends Object
    The KeYMediator provides control logic for the user interface implemented in Swing.

    Attention: Logic to apply rules has to be implemented user interface independent in the ProofControl!

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description

      fires that a GUI component that has asked for modal access has been closed, so views can be enabled again

      fires the request of a GUI component for modal access this can be used to disable all views even if the GUI component has no built in modal support

      • fireModalDialogOpened

        public void fireModalDialogOpened(EventObject e)
        fires the request of a GUI component for modal access this can be used to disable all views even if the GUI component has no built in modal support

      • fireModalDialogClosed

        fires that a GUI component that has asked for modal access has been closed, so views can be enabled again

      • enableWhenProofLoaded

        public void enableWhenProofLoaded(Action a)

      • enableWhenProofLoaded

        @Deprecated
public void enableWhenProofLoaded(AbstractButton a)
        Deprecated. 
        Disable certain actions until a proof is loaded. This is a workaround for a broken proof macro menu in the GUI. Remove this method as soon as another solution can be found.
